content.en:
Territory of Five Thousand and Nine.

In a small city, there is an ordinary family here, and this ordinary family has a second realm of extradimensional realm, and more than a dozen of the first realm of transcendent realm.

Such a family is undoubtedly not worth mentioning in the entire Five Thousand and Nine Hao Territory.

And what all the extradimensional realms didn't know was that the Holy Sea Realm Lord had come to this family.

In fact, the second realm of this family is the clone he refined, and he is hiding here now, and he is safe for the time being.

"Damn, I finally obtained the inheritance of the Ka Ye wisdom body, and I was actually publicized by those third realms. If I knew this, I would have killed them at a heavy price!"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord said angrily.

However, when he thought of this Kasaba wisdom body, he was very excited.

This is quite a good innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and what is missing is only the third layer, the content of the first and second layers is still complete, and it does not affect the cultivation, as long as the multi-dimensional wisdom light is not displayed, it will not affect the potential.

Once he cultivated, even if he was at the level of the first level, he would be sure to kill with the ordinary fourth realm transcendent realm.

After his strength skyrocketed, he also dared to break into a few treasures that he didn't dare to go to, and maybe he could get 897 treasures that would help him impact the fourth realm.

When the time comes, if he steps into the fourth realm, then in the territory of the fifth thousand, he will no longer be afraid of other forces.

This plan is naturally beautiful, but it is very dangerous at the moment, if he is found by the Fourth Realm, he will definitely not survive.

"If you want to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, you must use the treasure of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, and it is best to enter the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree to cultivate. "

The Kaye Wisdom Tree is not in the territory of No. 5,000, but in the territory of No. 4,000, and it was created by an unimaginable powerhouse who passed by the Kaye Wisdom Tree and had an epiphany.

Now, the power that holds the Wisdom Tree of the Kasa is a behemoth, and there are all and more than one existence in the Fifth Realm.

How can he be qualified to go over!

So, he had no choice but to settle for the next best thing and get some Ka Ye Wisdom Leaves!

"Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, I can't get it at all now, but those forces with the Fourth Realm can get it, if it is usual, I can buy Ka Ye Wisdom Ye from the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, and it will definitely not attract attention if the number is small. But now, where do I dare to go to the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce to trade the Wisdom Leaf of the Jiaye Leaf!"

As soon as he thought of this, the Holy Sea Realm (Bead) Lord had a headache.

Of course, without the help of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, it is not impossible to cultivate, but if you cultivate, you are almost certain to die.

The Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf will undoubtedly make cultivation a hundred times easier and a hundred times less dangerous.

Of course.

If he wants to get out of danger, there is also a way, and that is to throw the inheritance away, so that no force will be watching him.

But how could he throw away the inheritance in his hand!

At present, he can only see the content of the first layer, and the content of the second layer is still vague, and only after practicing the first layer, can he observe the content of the second layer.

Therefore, he must keep the legacy.

"Let's continue to hide for now, the territory of Five Thousand and Nine is too big, and it will not be easy for them to find me. Moreover, I also have a special treasure on my body to conceal the aura, and I also have a doppelganger as a cover. Even if the Fourth Realm comes around here, it may not be able to see through my disguise!"

It was precisely with this disguise that he dared to keep the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye.

If he hadn't, he would have handed it over a long time ago.

......

Ye Tian came to the Five Thousand and Nine Territory, and he was not in a hurry to find the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

Even if he had a copy body, the scope of the copy body exploration was very small, and it would take too long to explore the entire Five Thousand Territory, and it would be impossible to do it.

Therefore, he still observes and observes first, waiting for the latest information.

"It's a pity that there is no secret method of tracking, otherwise, you can try to track down the Holy Sea Realm Lord!"

If the Holy Sea Realm Lord possessed the effect of the third layer of his Great Realm Armor Technique, the fourth realm would not be able to deduce the slightest trace, and it would be easy to hide.

It's a pity that the Holy Sea Realm Lord doesn't have this ability.

After coming to the territory of Five Thousand and Nine, Ye Tian stayed here with peace of mind and often inquired about news.

And there are too many extra-dimensional realms here, and most of the extra-dimensional realms also know that they have no hope of obtaining that innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, but they still have a trace of hope.

Of course, there are also the idea of watching the excitement, and there are many extra-dimensional realms that serve as the eyes and ears of the forces, come here to inquire about the news, and provide first-hand information for the forces.

Before you know it, ten extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

A number of Fourth Realm powerhouses joined forces to urge the tracking class of super-level extra-dimensional Dao soldiers to deduce the traces of the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and finally locked a super-dimensional realm range.

This is already the limit!

"The Holy Sea Realm Lord is in the Ice Flame Realm, and the Ice Flame Realm is enough to rank sixth in the Five Thousand and Nine Territory, with more than a hundred Third Realm ......"

These Fourth Realm beings immediately went to the Ice Flame Realm and directly blocked this extradimensional realm with great power.

Next, they have two options.

The first option is to enter the Ice Flame Realm by yourself and slowly find the Holy Sea Realm Lord, but this method is not easy to find the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and it is a waste of time.

The second method is to destroy the Ice Flame Realm.

With their means, it is enough to make all the extradimensional realms and weak creatures under the third realm fall, and when the time comes, there are only more than a hundred third realms left, and it is not easy to investigate?

When one of the Fourth Realms proposed to destroy the Ice Flame Realm, the other Fourth Realm immediately objected.

"You can't destroy the Ice Flame Realm, there is still the extra-dimensional realm of our Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, and the branches of your major forces also have some extra-dimensional realms in it. "

"Hehe, it's just some of the first realm and the second realm, if you die, you will die, compared to the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, it is not worth mentioning at all!"

Soon, the dissenting Fourth Realm quarreled.

Suddenly. []

The words of a Fourth Realm made them stop arguing.

"Destroying the Realm of Ice Flame is a helpless move, and it's best to look for it slowly at first. What if there is a Fifth Realm in seclusion in the Realm of Ice and Fire? This possibility is not impossible, or it is impossible to hide a descendant of the Sixth Realm and come here to play. As long as there is such a possibility, then destroying the Ice Flame Realm is looking for death. In the past, it was not without cases where the destruction of the extradimensional realm led to the destruction of one party's forces in retaliation. "

Saying this, the other Fourth Realms became solemn.

It's true that this possibility is only 1 in 100,000 or even 1 in a million, or even lower, but there is still a slight possibility.

So, at first, it's better to choose the first method, the first method doesn't work, and then choose the second way to destroy the Ice Flame Realm.
